name: python3-jsonschema-path
title: python3-jsonschema-path
description:
Python module for object-oriented JSONSchema
This module provides a class SchemaPath to turn JSON Schema into
path-like structures, allowing one to traverse them in a similar way to
using pathlib.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jsonschema-path because Python module for object-oriented JSONSchema.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jsonschema-path as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jsonschema-path with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jsonschema-path --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
